titles.text: Shin Nippon Pro Wrestling: Toukon Road - Brave Spirits
新日本プロレスリング闘魂炎導

descriptions.text: Step into the ring with the bravest fighting souls of the New Japan Pro Wrestling league and fight your way to the top! With incredible 3D graphics and an intuitive control system, Toukon Road brings the most realistic wrestling action ever presented in video games!
